name: Project-level PAI data provision (machine-readable, FMP-liftable)
summary: Data-provision test, distinct from criterion 3 (entity-level Art 4 policy). For each of the 11 material PAIs, the project must provide actual measured value (operational) or credible projected value with methodology (pre-operational), measurement period, methodology reference, and where verified — verifier identity + assurance level. Verification gate: when criterion 3 (entity Art 4 policy) is partially_aligned or weaker, ≥9 of 11 PAIs must be third-party-verified; otherwise the band caps at partially_aligned. Component of criterion 9 evidence pack. Reads criterion 3 read-only — no cascade.
successor_regime_note: Under proposed SFDR 2.0 (Commission proposal COM(2025) 841, tabled 2025), product-level PAI data provision is expected to be retained as a core test for the highest-tier category. PB Art 9 verdicts issued under methodology v3.4 are stamped to SFDR v1 (Reg 2019/2088 as consolidated 09/01/2024) and remain valid as of date of issue.
